Split.rest

Pay once and split between the rest of the group

Easily split expenses with friends, family, or colleagues. Using Split.rest, one person pays, and the rest of the group settles up — simple, fair, and hassle-free.

Open in browser
OR

Available in bright colors if you are not the dead inside type

Easily view the details of each split, including edit history!

Multiple split types to choose from

Never be in doubt who should pay next with the roulette (it's fair, we promise)

Settle up with a single click. Well, two actually, but who's counting?

Easily manage group members

Works great on both small and big screens
